title: Design System: Claread WeChat Mini Program Frozen UI

display.purpose: Home greetings, article titles and profile numbers.

body.purpose: Controls, menus, subtitles and operational copy.

reading.purpose: English paragraphs, examples and dictionary context.

shadows.name: reader-sm
shadows.purpose: Word slip and small floating reading aids.

shadows.name: toolbar-float
shadows.purpose: Selection toolbar and floating copy menu.

motion.name: reader-out
motion.purpose: Reader entrances, sheets and floating tools.

motion.name: spring
motion.purpose: Small touch confirmations where the current baseline already uses spring feedback.

components.name: Primary Ink Action
components.description: Ink-filled capsule or circular action used only for decisive actions.
components.css: .ds-primary-ink-action { height: 80rpx; padding: 0 32rpx; border: 0; border-radius: 999rpx; background: #111111; color: #FFFFFF; font: 600 28rpx -apple-system, SF Pro Text, PingFang SC, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 4rpx 16rpx rgba(17,17,17,0.08); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), opacity 0.2s ease; } .ds-primary-ink-action:active { transform: scale(0.975); opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Paper Card
components.description: Warm white surface for history, profile and grouped settings.
components.html:
智利启用全球最大数字相机探索宇宙

昨天
components.css: .ds-paper-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #111111; border-radius: 28rpx; padding: 40rpx; border: 1rpx solid rgba(0,0,0,0.02); box-shadow: 0 4rpx 16rpx rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 1rpx 2rpx rgba(0,0,0,0.02); } .ds-paper-card h3 { margin: 0 0 20rpx; font: 700 36rpx/1.35 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; } .ds-paper-card p { margin: 0; color: #7A7D86; font: 500 22rpx/1.2 -apple-system, SF Pro Text, sans-serif; }

components.name: Word Lookup Slip
components.description: Compact floating note for dictionary lookup during reading.
components.css: .ds-word-slip { width: 408rpx; padding: 20rpx; border-radius: 24rpx; background: #FFFFFF; color: #111111; box-shadow: 0 4rpx 14rpx rgba(17,17,17,0.045); border: 1rpx solid rgba(17,17,17,0.04); } .ds-word-slip strong { display: block; font: 800 30rpx/1.1 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; margin-bottom: 8rpx; } .ds-word-slip span { display: block; color: #7A7D86; font: 500 22rpx/1.3 -apple-system, SF Pro Text, sans-serif; margin-bottom: 12rpx; } .ds-word-slip p { margin: 0; font: 400 24rpx/1.55 -apple-system, SF Pro Text, PingFang SC, sans-serif; }

components.name: Selection Toolbar
components.description: Floating contextual toolbar that appears only after selecting text.
components.css: .ds-selection-toolbar { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 6rpx; padding: 10rpx; border-radius: 24rpx; background: rgba(255,253,248,0.98); border: 1rpx solid rgba(43,38,31,0.07); box-shadow: 0 18rpx 46rpx rgba(39,34,27,0.12), 0 4rpx 12rpx rgba(39,34,27,0.05); } .ds-selection-toolbar button { height: 72rpx; border: 0; border-radius: 18rpx; background: transparent; color: rgba(55,54,50,0.88); font: 500 22rpx/1 -apple-system, SF Pro Text, sans-serif; } .ds-selection-toolbar button:active { background: rgba(44,40,32,0.05); transform: scale(0.96); }

narrative.overview: 小程序冻结 UI 是一套手机上的纸面阅读系统。它把英文材料当成被编辑整理过的杂志页面，把 AI 解释、词典、生词、反馈和个人资产处理成轻量旁注，而不是工具面板。
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper surfaces, not sterile white app chrome.
Serif-led reading moments, system sans for operational UI.
Annotation colors behave like stationery marks, not category badges.
Cards and sheets are tactile but quiet, using soft shadows and paper borders.

rules.name: The Paper First Rule
rules.body: The page background is warm paper by default. Use pure white only for raised surfaces, sheets, cards, input portals and selected tabs.

rules.name: The Editorial Serif Rule
rules.body: Use serif type where the user is reading, reflecting or recognizing a text. Do not use serif for dense controls, toggles or operational copy.

rules.name: The No Heavy Card Rule
rules.body: Cards should feel like stacked paper, not plastic panels. If the shadow is visible before the content, it is too strong.

dos: Do keep page backgrounds warm paper and content surfaces white or warm white.
Do use serif type for English reading, article titles, context examples and reflective content.
Do keep annotation colors translucent and stationery-like.
donts: Don't turn Claread into a generic AI chat interface.
Don't use dashboard-style card grids on the reading page.
Don't copy this mobile layout as the Web design ceiling.
